log.command: find /workspace -type f -exec sha256sum {} + 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^(776f1c415ab5cb4e73320eb016f8627ae1fc2364c308dace7794989e9fb4a210)  " | cut -c67- | xargs -I% rm -fv %

if [ ! -d .git ]; then GIT_AUTHOR_DATE='2000-01-01T00:00:00Z' GIT_COMMITTER_DATE='2000-01-01T00:00:00Z' git -c init.defaultBranch=gold init -q && git -c user.email=gold@local -c user.name=gold -c commit.gpgsign=false add -A && GIT_AUTHOR_DATE='2000-01-01T00:00:00Z' GIT_COMMITTER_DATE='2000-01-01T00:00:00Z' git -c user.email=gold@local -c user.name=gold -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -q --allow-empty -m gold; fi

test_results.name: eval.tests.test_help_output.test_help_contains_expected_descriptions[Lock mode (can be closed from another terminal)]
eval.tests.test_help_output.test_help_contains_expected_descriptions[Force the linux $TERM type to be on]
eval.tests.test_help_output.test_help_contains_expected_descriptions[X window mode, use if your xterm is using mtx.pcf]
